description_long: This shotgun features a robust wooden full stock with a smooth, dark brown finish, seamlessly transitioning into a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The barrel is relatively long and slender, with a vented rib running along the top for improved aiming and heat dissipation. A prominent drum magazine is mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity feeding system. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a simple trigger mechanism. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments, making it suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A long-barreled shotgun with a wooden full stock, matte black metal receiver, and a drum magazine beneath the barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full wooden stock, long barrel, and prominent drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular drum magazine and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, long barrel, and drum magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible reinforcement
